creator: kiri@kiri.toba-cmt.ac.jp
text:
I've made a NEW port with respect to japanese afm fonts.

	I put the port packed with 'tar czf' and uuencode below "Fix:"

	Packed tarball is

		810 Sep 22 20:53 ja-japaneseAFM-1.0.tar.gz

	Packed list is

		 60 Sep 11 17:15 1997 japaneseAFM/files/md5
		  0 Sep 11 17:51 1997 japaneseAFM/pkg/
